content.text:
I'm ready to help you explore the codebase and design implementation plans! 

Let me start by getting oriented to this project. I can see this is a Django-based project with a focus on contests and judging (based on the git status showing changes to `site/judge/views/contests.py`).

<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /home/ubuntu && find . -type f -name "*.py" -path "*/settings*" | head -20</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /home/ubuntu && ls -la</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /home/ubuntu && find . -type f -name "README*" -o -name "readme*" | head -10</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

Let me explore the project structure to better understand the architecture:

<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /home/ubuntu && tree -L 2 -d -I '__pycache__|*.pyc|node_modules' | head -50</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

I'm now familiar with the environment and ready to receive your requirements. Please provide:

1. **The specific feature or task** you want me to design an implementation plan for
2. **Any perspective or approach** you'd like me to take (e.g., focus on performance, maintainability, security, backwards compatibility, etc.)
3. **Any relevant context** about the current system that might be helpful

I'll then explore the codebase thoroughly using read-only operations and create a detailed implementation plan for you.
